_description: This fixture represents an INVALID lineage state with a cycle. The registry must detect and reject this.
_expected_behavior: ResearchRunLineageManager.detect_cycle() must return True for run-cycle-a-001

runs._note: B claims A as parent — creates a cycle: A -> B -> A
